description: Product Description About Leopacat This brand "Leopacat" is a celebration of life, quality, and the pursuit of happiness The name itself, a fusion of "Love" and "Patience," reflects our dedication to crafting products that stand the test of time and bring a sense of love and tranquility to your life Discover the joy in the ordinary with Leopacat, where love and patience converge to create a world of positivity Gold Serving Bowl with Lid Gold Floral Embossing A beautiful gold pattern relief fruit bowl adds a modern minimalist feel to your home while safely storing your fruit. Turkish ottoman style, elegant and unique, used to serve candy, date fruit, dessert Decorative candy display trays are a great choice for friends and family as housewarming, wedding, party, birthday, thanksgiving, christmas, holiday gifts Specification: Item Type: Candy Dish Material: Zinc Alloy Size: 10 x 7cm / 3.9 x 2.8in Product Use: Wedding Family Buffet Hotel Bar Decoration Package List: 1 x Candy Dish 1 x Lid Round Golden Bowl The Turkish bowl has a vintage gold style and is round in shape, making it an elegant table decoration. Equipped with a lid to keep it clean efficiently, the gold serving bowl can be displayed with the tray as decorative tableware for the dressing table Whether you want to store fresh fruit, vegetables, nuts, snacks, candy and more food, the fruit bowls for the kitchen can easily meet your daily needs Gorgeous Design The quadrangular candy sugar serving bowl is made of zinc alloy high quality metal and serves as a keeping container for chocolate cane sugar.
